title: GCS Technical Note: material selection for structural panels

# GCS Technical Note: material selection for structural panels

**Attendees:** Priya Nair, Tobias Wren, Felix Herrera, Nina Schulz

## Summary

This page covers the material selection for structural panels for the GCS subsystem. Key items discussed and actions agreed are recorded here.

## Actions

- Follow-up with Rowan Ellery on outstanding items.
